items.title: Patient: Aren Valis (age 32, fictional)
items.summary: Demo patient record. Refugee from sovereign-ruins, treated for exposure + minor lattice contamination. Discharged to Pia Thalis infirmary 18 days ago.

items.title: Patient: Mira Thorne (age 71, fictional)
items.summary: Demo patient record. Verge healer, treats herself for chronic glyph-burn from forty years of refusal practice. Stable.

items.title: Patient: Brackish (age 11, fictional)
items.summary: Demo patient record. Plaza urchin. Routine check-in. Healthy except for chronic sleep deficit. Refuses bed offers.
